Defines a system loop function and prints a confirmation message.

# Purpose
The code defines a function [`sysloop`](<#pebble-firmware/src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/targets/esp8266/js/mainsysloop>) that takes a parameter `ticknow` and calls another function `blink` within its body. The purpose of [`sysloop`](<#pebble-firmware/src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/targets/esp8266/js/mainsysloop>) is to execute the `blink` function, which is not defined in the provided code, indicating that `blink` is expected to be defined elsewhere in the program. Additionally, the code prints the message "main js OK" to the console, which can serve as a simple confirmation that the script has loaded and is running. This code provides narrow functionality, primarily focusing on executing the `blink` function and confirming script execution.
